articles.title: THOC6 deficiency leads to Cardiomyopathy by Reducing Myocardial Contractile Proteins in Cardiomyocytes.
articles.authors: Yuan W, Jiang Z, Li F, Chen H, Zhang X et al.
articles.key_finding: METHODS AND RESULTS: This study we firstly utilized CRISPR/Cas9 to knock out THOC6 in H9C2 cardiomyocytes, revealing a reduction in cell proliferation and an increase in apoptosis.
